uses: Coleospadix oninensis, also known as the Chinese fir or Taiwan fir, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant's extracts have been reported to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, Coleospadix oninensis is used to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, among other conditions. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Coleospadix oninensis in modern medicine.
